instagram_post.note: Stored with creator_id as UUID. All 25 IG posts have corresponding chunks and embeddings.

video.note: Stored with creator_id as slug 'iris_bertran'. Video caption text from IG reels. NO EMBEDDINGS generated — invisible to semantic search.

carousel.note: Stored with creator_id as slug 'iris_bertran'. NO EMBEDDINGS — invisible to search.

content_embeddings.note: Only the 25 instagram_post chunks have embeddings. The 93 video+carousel chunks have ZERO embeddings — a critical gap.

rag_documents.note: Empty. This table exists but no documents have been ingested for Iris.

conversation_embeddings.note: Rich conversation history embeddings (37,160 messages across 1,589 leads). Used for conversation context, not creator knowledge RAG.

lead_memories.note: Per-lead facts, NOT creator knowledge. Used for personalized responses. 702 facts lack embeddings.

instagram_posts.note: All 25 posts already have chunks. Content refresh runs every 24h and picks up new posts automatically (max 20/cycle).

products.note: creators.product_price is 97 EUR but no products table entries exist. Product detector requires website scraping (3+ signals). No website_url configured for Iris.

booking_links.schema: meeting_type, title, duration_minutes, platform, url, price, is_active
booking_links.note: Booking/calendar integration. Pipeline exists but likely empty for Iris.

knowledge_base.note: Q&A pairs table. Zero entries for Iris. Used for 1-3% of messages needing factual data.

pipeline_modules: ingestion/v2/pipeline.py (full V2: scrape -> products -> FAQs -> tone -> chunks)
ingestion/v2/product_detector.py (signal-based, needs 3+ of: dedicated_page, CTA, price, description, payment_link, nav_listing, clear_title)
ingestion/v2/faq_extractor.py (hybrid regex+LLM: extract ¿...? patterns, filter noise, categorize)
ingestion/v2/sanity_checker.py (verify products belong to same domain)
website_scraping.note: Full website ingestion pipeline exists and works (Stefano has 396 website chunks). Iris has NO website_url set — pipeline cannot run.

personality_docs.status: EXISTS but not chunked for RAG
personality_docs.note: System prompt and copilot rules. These configure bot behavior but are not searchable via RAG.

gold_examples.status: Used for few-shot prompting, not RAG
gold_examples.note: Rich example set but used in prompt construction, not vector search.

learning_rules.status: Used for prompt injection, not RAG
learning_rules.note: Behavioral rules extracted from divergence analysis. Injected into system prompt.

conversation_summaries.status: EXISTS but not chunked for RAG

post_contexts.schema: active_promotion, promotion_deadline, recent_topics, recent_products, availability_hint, context_instructions
post_contexts.note: Temporal context from recent posts. Empty for Iris — post_context_refresh job (12h, 150s delay) may not be generating these.

fix_missing_embeddings.source: video + carousel chunks already in content_chunks
fix_missing_embeddings.effort: LOW — just run _embed_new_chunks() with correct creator_id format
fix_missing_embeddings.blocker: creator_id mismatch: chunks stored as 'iris_bertran' (slug), _embed_new_chunks queries by UUID. Need to pass slug OR query both formats.

website_scraping.effort: MEDIUM — set website_url on creator, run ingest_website_v2
website_scraping.blocker: No website_url configured. Iris may not have a website (she's a fitness instructor using IG primarily).

products_from_ig_captions.effort: MEDIUM — extract services/pricing from IG captions (barre classes, pilates, Flow4U, etc.)
products_from_ig_captions.blocker: Product detector requires website pages with 3+ signals. IG captions alone won't trigger detection. Need custom extraction or manual entry.
known_services_from_ig: Barre classes (Flow4U) — every Thursday 20:15h at Dinamic Sport Gym
Zumba classes at Dinamic Sport Gym
Sunday bonus sessions + brunch at Dinamic Sport Gym
Choreography classes at La Caja Negra

faq_from_conversations.effort: MEDIUM — mine 37K messages for common questions and Iris's real answers
faq_from_conversations.blocker: No automated pipeline exists for conversation-based FAQ extraction. Would need a new script.

audio_transcriptions.effort: HIGH — transcribe video audio for deeper content beyond captions
audio_transcriptions.blocker: Audio pipeline exists (ingestion/transcriber.py) but not wired for bulk RAG ingestion.

total_estimated_after_fixes.note_minimum: All 118 chunks searchable after embedding fix (was 25)

critical_gaps.gap: 93 chunks without embeddings (78% of content invisible to search)
critical_gaps.root_cause: creator_id format mismatch: video/carousel chunks stored with slug 'iris_bertran', but _embed_new_chunks() queries with UUID
critical_gaps.fix: Run _embed_new_chunks with creator_id='iris_bertran' (slug format) to match the 93 video/carousel chunks

critical_gaps.gap: Zero products/services in DB despite known offerings
critical_gaps.root_cause: No website_url configured; product_price=97 EUR exists on creator but no structured product data. Product detector requires website pages with 3+ signals.
known_services: Barre classes (Flow4U) — Thursday 20:15h, Dinamic Sport Gym
critical_gaps.fix: Manual product entry via admin API or custom IG caption product extractor

critical_gaps.root_cause: FAQ extractor requires website scraping; no website configured. Conversation history (37K msgs) contains answers but no extraction pipeline for it.
critical_gaps.fix: Mine gold_examples (100 active, especially 12 product_question + 1 pricing) for FAQ seed data, or mine conversation history

critical_gaps.root_cause: creators.website_url is NULL. Pipeline fully built and working for other creators.
critical_gaps.fix: If Iris has a website, Linktree, or booking page, set website_url and run ingest_website_v2. If not, this gap is expected for IG-primary creators.

critical_gaps.root_cause: Not populated during onboarding or ingestion
critical_gaps.fix: Auto-populate from IG bio, captions analysis, and conversation patterns

critical_gaps.gap: post_contexts table empty — no temporal context from recent posts
critical_gaps.root_cause: post_context_refresh job (12h, 150s delay) may not be generating contexts for Iris
critical_gaps.fix: Verify post_context_refresh is running; may need to trigger manually for Iris

critical_gaps.gap: content_performance table empty — no post analytics
critical_gaps.root_cause: Post analytics tracking not wired for Iris
critical_gaps.fix: Enable content_performance tracking in media capture job

what_it_does: 1. Queries all creators with bot_active=True + instagram_token
2. Calls ingest_instagram_v2() for each (append mode, clean_before=False)
3. Generates embeddings for new chunks via _embed_new_chunks()
content_refresh_loop.production_connection: Uses existing DB connection pool (api/database.py, pool_size=5+7=12) and IG tokens from creators table
content_refresh_loop.token_handling: If token is EAA* (Facebook Page token), falls back to INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN env var if it starts with IGAAT
known_issues: creator_id passed as UUID to _embed_new_chunks, but some chunks stored with slug — embedding gap for video/carousel
Max 20 posts/cycle means initial ingestion of large accounts is slow
5s delay between creators — appropriate for 2-3 creators

post_context_refresh.purpose: Analyze recent posts for temporal context (promotions, topics)

rag_hydration.purpose: Load all content_chunks from DB into in-memory RAG (max 500/creator)

embedding_config.storage: pgvector in content_embeddings table (cosine similarity, HNSW index)
embedding_config.index_type: HNSW (replaced IVFFlat in migration 038, works with any row count)

comparison_with_stefano.gap_factor: Stefano has 8x more content chunks. Iris has 25 searchable vs Stefano's ~948. Primary difference: Stefano has 396 website chunks.

quick_wins_priority.action: Fix embedding gap — embed 93 video/carousel chunks
Manual product entry for known services
quick_wins_priority.impact: Bot can answer pricing/scheduling questions accurately
quick_wins_priority.how: Insert 5-6 products via products table with verified prices

quick_wins_priority.effort: MEDIUM (script to extract Q&A from gold_examples with intent=product_question/pricing)
quick_wins_priority.impact: Bot handles factual queries (horarios, precios, ubicacion) without hallucinating
quick_wins_priority.how: Query gold_examples WHERE intent IN ('product_question','pricing') and insert as knowledge_base entries

quick_wins_priority.action: Set website_url if Iris has one (Linktree, booking page, etc.)
quick_wins_priority.how: UPDATE creators SET website_url = '...' WHERE id = '8e9d...' then POST /ingestion_v2/full-refresh/iris_bertran
